validation.nicknameSpecialChar: Nickname can only contain letters and numbers.
validation.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be 10 Korean characters or 16 alphanumeric characters or less.

mypage.agreeToDeactivate: I agree to the deactivation terms.
mypage.pleaseAgreeDeactivate: Please agree to the deactivation terms.
mypage.deactivateConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to deactivate?
mypage.deactivateWarning1: All account information will be deleted immediately and cannot be recovered.
mypage.deactivateWarning2: Saved travel records, reservations, and preference data will be permanently deleted.
mypage.deactivateWarning3: Even if you re-register with the same account, previous data cannot be restored.
mypage.travelPreferencesDesc: Set your preferences to be reflected in your travel plans!
mypage.noRecommendationDesc: Start a chat first. We will suggest new topics from your saved conversation summaries.
mypage.noRecommendationHint: Recommendations appear when chat history summary is stored.
mypage.deleteReservationConfirm: Are you sure you wanna delete this reservation?
